title: Wave 17 - Manager property actions (reserve/release/status transitions)
description: Coordinate Wave 17 to implement manager operational property actions with deterministic API contracts, mobile UI wiring, and QA regression safeguards.
acceptance_criteria: Wave 17 tickets are defined for architect/backend/mobile/qa with dependency order
Execution plan includes PR/Jira traceability and rollback checkpoints for property state mutations
Risk log covers concurrency collisions, role-scope enforcement, and stale UI state handling
